title: Not Enough Feasts
description: Basic mod that extends the vanilla foods with better ones!
body:
**_Not Enough Feasts_  is a small but flavorful mod that expands your Minecraft farming and food options.
It adds new crops, ingredients, and treats to discover and enjoy during your adventures:**

🧅 **Onions – A new food item that can be grown from seeds.**

🌱 **Onion Seeds & Roots – Plant and harvest onions with unique growth stages.**

🥧 **Apple Pie – A delicious new dessert to bake and enjoy.**

🌿 **World Generation – Onion bushes now spawn naturally in the world, making exploration more rewarding.**

**Requres** **[Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)**
